text.message: I seen blue but I didn’t even think u were talking to me lol
I don’t really care if Orange gets it… I’d prefer not but here we are.
this is literally just so i can 4:1
cool so black is going to plow me
Well, maybe with the 7 and some lucky roles
you know you didnt have to do that
okay 5 was the only thing that got me that
but now my game is over, so i think i have nothing to do but end you game too
every single one of you plowed last
at this point orange you might as well just close the tab and let a bot take over
ah yes last place stole from first
not first plowing last for the 3rd time
instead of building to more ore
I think orange is talking about when you road built to the 10 sheep port
Quick settles are better for me lol
because you are the favorite for road
U think im the foavorite for road over black LOL
think of blue leaving the 3/8 open as a gift
It's legitimately your best chance at winning after my plow lol
Oof red y think it’s me over black?
red felt bad about the solo mono ore on me
(but honestly yeah even after that I'm probably in second after red)
Somebody better take that road before he wins the game
I'd be on 7 if I did
and lose road to go to 3
yeah but there's a big danger of you winning this turn
long term you can't win but you're very close this turn
which I don't think we have
Just saying you didn’t have to panic for a dev
i can take road with help
